modelName: Professional Stainless Steel Sauté Pan with Lid, 32cm
description: This professional-grade Zinel sauté pan is engineered for high-volume commercial kitchens and serious home enthusiasts. Featuring a substantial 32cm diameter and a massive 9.2-litre capacity, this specific variant includes a heavy-duty, tight-fitting stainless steel lid to lock in moisture and heat. Constructed from premium stainless steel with an encapsulated sandwich base, it ensures even heat distribution across all hob types, including induction. The design incorporates a long ergonomic handle and a helper handle for safe lifting of the large 1015 model when full.
features: Diameter: 32cm; Capacity: 9.2 litres; Material: 18/10 Stainless Steel body with polished exterior; Base: Encapsulated aluminum core for thermal distribution; Hob Compatibility: Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen, and Induction; Lid: Stainless steel for heat retention.
uses: Searing meat and poultry, sautéing vegetables, reducing sauces, braising large cuts, preparing large-volume risottos or pasta dishes.

accessories.name: Stainless Steel Lid
accessories.description: Matching 32cm lid to retain heat and moisture.

name: Zinel Professional Stainless Steel Sauté Pan with Lid, 32cm
